consumerTone: plain English; educational clinical-annotation context only; sibling sample rows are not local findings; no diagnosis, personal disease-risk estimate, pathogenicity classification, carrier-status call, medication, screening, diagnostic-testing, reproductive, lifestyle, treatment, or actionability guidance

genomeEvidence.observedValue: selected derived lookup row; heterozygous; public variant identifier rs80357914; ClinVar-submitted germline classification supplied as pathogenic for a hereditary cancer condition; review status supplied as criteria provided, multiple submitters, no conflicts; no phenotype, family history, confirmatory test, or medical action supplied

selected derived lookup row; heterozygous; public variant identifier rs1800562; ClinVar-submitted interpretation context supplied as condition-associated but penetrance, clinical diagnosis, iron studies, family history, and medical actionability are not supplied

ACMG/AMP evidence codes, submitter rationale text, expert-panel review, assertion date, condition specificity, segregation, functional evidence, population-frequency thresholds, and direct Clinical Annotator sample rows are unavailable in this fixture; sibling Healthcare Pro sample rows are observed separately as output-structure evidence

personal diagnosis, symptoms, ancestry calibration, age, sex, family history, laboratory confirmation, clinician interpretation, and direct Clinical Annotator sample rows are unavailable in this fixture; sibling Healthcare Pro sample rows are observed separately as clinical-annotation output-structure evidence

inputManifest.source: synthetic derived clinical-annotation lookup evidence for clinical-annotator-variants validation

missingInputPolicy: Report unavailable review metadata, ACMG/AMP criteria evidence, phenotype fit, family history, confirmatory testing, penetrance, and direct Clinical Annotator sample rows explicitly; use sibling Healthcare Pro sample rows only as observed output structure and do not infer diagnosis, disease risk, pathogenicity classification, carrier status, penetrance, family-member risk, clinical actionability, medication, screening, diagnostic-testing, reproductive, lifestyle, or treatment guidance.
reportPurpose: Consumer clinical-annotation report using selected derived ClinVar/dbSNP lookup fields plus sibling Healthcare Pro sample-output structure, while explicitly separating submitted database assertions from diagnosis, personal medical risk, and medical action.
